entities.name: AuctionLot
entities.description: Individual livestock auction lot (cattle group or single bull) that can be searched, bid on, watched, and edited.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Listing title, e.g., '15 Hereford bred cows - Kansas'

fields.name: description
fields.description: Full text description of the lot

fields.name: category_id
fields.description: Primary livestock class/category for navigation and filtering

fields.name: breed
fields.description: Primary breed, e.g., 'Angus', 'Hereford'

fields.name: sex
fields.description: Sex of animals in the lot (bulls, cows, steers, heifers, or mixed group)

fields.name: head_count
fields.description: Quantity of head in the lot

fields.name: weight_min_lbs
fields.description: Minimum individual weight in pounds

fields.name: weight_max_lbs
fields.description: Maximum individual weight in pounds

fields.name: average_weight_lbs
fields.description: Average weight in pounds (used for display and filters)

fields.name: age_years
fields.description: Age in years (used especially for bulls)

fields.name: location_state
fields.description: State where the lot is located, e.g., 'Oklahoma', 'Texas'

fields.name: location_city
fields.description: City where the lot is located, e.g., 'Dodge City'

fields.name: location_zip
fields.description: ZIP/postal code for distance and radius searches

fields.name: latitude
fields.description: Latitude for distance sorting

fields.name: longitude
fields.description: Longitude for distance sorting

fields.name: auction_format
fields.description: Whether the lot is in a timed online auction or an upcoming live auction

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle status for My Listings filtering and edit behavior

fields.name: is_own_listing
fields.description: True if this lot was created by the current single user (for My Listings)

fields.name: price_unit
fields.description: Basis for bidding and price filters (per head, per pound, or per pair)

fields.name: starting_bid_amount
fields.description: Starting bid amount in USD per the specified price unit

fields.name: reserve_price_amount
fields.description: Reserve price amount in USD per the specified price unit

fields.name: current_price_amount
fields.description: Current effective price (e.g., current bid) in USD per the specified price unit, used for filters and sorting

fields.name: reserve_met
fields.description: Indicates whether the current bids meet or exceed the reserve price

fields.name: opening_datetime
fields.description: Auction start time (used for upcoming live auctions)

fields.name: closing_datetime
fields.description: Auction closing date and time used for closing-soon filters

fields.name: seller_display_name
fields.description: Display name of seller shown on lot details

fields.name: seller_ranch_name
fields.description: Seller ranch or business name

fields.name: photos
fields.description: Array of image URLs for the lot

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Optional free-form tags used for search, e.g., 'Angus heifer'

entities.name: Category
entities.description: Reference data for livestock auction categories/classes used in navigation, filters, and interests.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Slug identifier used in URLs and as category_id on lots

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable category name, e.g., 'Feeder cattle'

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Ordering for category menus

entities.name: ProfileSettings
entities.description: Single-user profile with contact details, account type, and visibility preferences.

fields.name: full_name
fields.description: User's full name, e.g., 'Jordan Cattlebuyer'

fields.name: ranch_name
fields.description: Ranch or business name, e.g., 'Circle J Ranch'

fields.name: email
fields.description: Contact email used for registration

fields.name: account_type
fields.description: Selected at registration; determines default role

fields.name: preferred_contact_method
fields.description: Preferred method for communication related to lots

fields.name: show_buying_interests_on_profile
fields.description: Toggle for displaying livestock interests publicly

entities.name: LivestockInterestSelection
entities.description: Selections of primary livestock interests (e.g., feeder cattle, bred heifers) associated with the single user's profile.

fields.name: profile_id
fields.description: Links this interest selection to a ProfileSettings record

fields.name: interest_type
fields.description: Type of livestock interest selectable via checkboxes

fields.name: is_selected
fields.description: Whether this interest is currently selected for the profile

entities.name: WatchlistItem
entities.description: An entry representing a single auction lot that has been added to the current user's watchlist.

fields.name: lot_id
fields.description: ID of the AuctionLot being watched

fields.name: added_at
fields.description: When the lot was added to the watchlist

entities.name: SavedSearch
entities.description: Saved auction search with criteria and in-site alert settings.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Custom label, e.g., 'TX bred heifers under 2k'

fields.name: keyword
fields.description: Keyword terms, e.g., 'bred heifers'

fields.name: category_id
fields.description: Optional category filter applied to the search

fields.name: location_zip
fields.description: ZIP code used for radius search

fields.name: radius_miles
fields.description: Radius around ZIP in miles (e.g., 100)

fields.name: price_unit
fields.description: What price type the price filters apply to

fields.name: price_max
fields.description: Maximum allowed price (per selected unit), e.g., 2000 per head

fields.name: closing_date_filter_type
fields.description: How closing dates are constrained, e.g., 'ending within 7 days'

fields.name: closing_date_days_from_now_min
fields.description: Minimum days from now for closing date (0 for today)

fields.name: closing_date_days_from_now_max
fields.description: Maximum days from now for closing date (e.g., 7 for 'within 7 days')

fields.name: sort_option
fields.description: Default sorting applied when running the saved search

fields.name: alerts_enabled
fields.description: Whether in-site alerts are enabled for this saved search

entities.name: Bid
entities.description: Represents a single bid placed on an auction lot, including the user's maximum bid.

fields.name: lot_id
fields.description: AuctionLot being bid on

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Bid amount in USD, expressed per the price_unit

fields.name: price_unit
fields.description: Unit for the bid (e.g., 2.05 per pound)

fields.name: is_maximum_bid
fields.description: True if this is the bidder's maximum (proxy) bid

fields.name: is_user_bid
fields.description: True if this bid was placed by the current single user

fields.name: source
fields.description: How the bid was created (manual entry vs automatic proxy increment)

entities.name: MessageThread
entities.description: Conversation thread between the current user and a counterparty (e.g., seller) about an auction lot.

fields.name: lot_id
fields.description: AuctionLot this conversation is about, if any

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Subject line, often derived from lot title

fields.name: counterpart_name
fields.description: Name of the other party (e.g., seller)

fields.name: last_message_preview
fields.description: Snippet of most recent message

fields.name: unread_count
fields.description: Number of unread messages in this thread

entities.name: Message
entities.description: Individual message within a message thread, including sent and received messages.

fields.name: thread_id
fields.description: ID of the MessageThread this message belongs to

fields.name: body
fields.description: Full text content, e.g., 'I'm interested in this Angus bull...'

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Whether the message was sent by the current user or received
